title: Traveling with Kyle - Living in Chile Part 16/17

transcript.text: This father of her kid was really jealous and was like always accusing her of two-timing on him.
Like once they went on a trip down to Patagonia and with him and her son when he was one year old and his friend and his friend's girlfriend and his friend's girlfriend didn't like her.
I guess she was jealous with her or something because her boyfriend was the king of the gang or whatever.
And she told her she accused her of being a wannabe angel just because she didn't want to smoke weed with the gang so she punched a girl in the face.
Anyways, yeah, because my wife, she never smoked weed. I only saw her smoke weed maybe like 12 times the whole time I was with her.
But anyways, yeah, they go out on this trip and this girl didn't like her so she told, and she was on the phone one day arguing with her mom, having some emotional conversation.
So the lady went and told her boyfriend, my wife's boyfriend, that she was on a conversation with her boyfriend and she overheard it.
So he came and like yelled at her and decided he was going to get revenge by driving off and finishing the trip, the vacation without her and left her there with her six month old baby.
So she had to like, and she didn't have any money. So she had to borrow money from the owner of the hotel room and go back to Santiago.
But anyways, yeah, but I mean, she was pretty jealous with me too. Like I went to a hotel, to a party, a, a, what's it called a Halloween party once and it was really late in the day.
It was like four in the morning and I started talking to some girl just for a couple of seconds.
And the next thing I know my wife's in my face to screaming her head off at me as loud as she can.
Telling me that I'm two time in her and then she's not going to let that happen.
And what the hell am I doing? Talk to another woman. So I was like, Whoa.
So I grabbed her and threw her in the, uh, in the, uh, elevator and we left and, uh, we got in the back of a pickup.
Some guy from the party were like offered to drive us back to our house, but my wife was in the front seat.
And so we got out of the pickup only she takes off with the guy.
I guess she was going to try and get revenge by like leaving with the guy.
And so like her brother who was with us, like runs after the truck, totally freaking out.
Like, Oh no, he's abducting my sister. He's abducting my sister. Then he runs back.
And, um, like tells the family, the whole family freaks out. Like she's going to get raped or something.
So they call the cops and the cops come over and they're all the cops that go looking for her.
And like the cause of this huge, huge stir, freaking out.
And then she comes back like an hour later and, um, they like totally freak out on her, like yelling at her.
Um, but then she comes in the room. I'm just like, let's just go to bed.
But, um, I mean, but I mean, she too timed on me with a Norwegian guy and with this Italian guy.

And that's who actually gave her her baby. And that's who she's with right now. So, um, but she did bust me because when I went to Argentina to try and, but the only reason I went to Argentina was to try and see if I get like a baby.
My Argentine girlfriend to help me get money out of this check from the two months of work. And they only were paying me.
There was like, this was, they paid me an after devaluation money too, but I couldn't get the money because the bank had gone defunct.
But I ended up, you know, but I didn't tell my wife that I went to Argentina. Well, she was my girlfriend at the time because I didn't want her to like get all pissed off at me.
But she found out anyway, because I, I was stupid and I was all high, you know, and I left like my, my bus ticket in my pocket.

So she got all pissed off, punched me in the face and gave me this bloody lip. But, uh, and then it was funny because right when she did that, I got, I got the worst asthma attack I've ever had in my life.
Dude. And like almost died. Like it was crazy. So I actually had to quit smoking weed for like a year and a half. I didn't smoke anything because I was just terrified to do it.

And cause when, cause like, and I think I got that asthma attack from Buenos Aires. Like I cannot go to Buenos Aires. I went, I spent six days in the hospital in Buenos Aires cause I like almost died from an asthma attack.
And then when I went to, I went first originally went to Santiago from being there the second time I almost died in Santiago. That was probably the closest I'd ever come to death.
I was in my, my hotel room and I was just like struggling to stay conscious. I could barely breathe.
There's something, there's some kind of plant that only exists in Buenos Aires that I am deadly allergic to that will close up my alveoli and kill me dead.
Like I cannot go to point. I am terrified of that place. I will die if I go there.
Um, there's, there's a weird plant there, man. So it was crazy. So anyways, but that gave me a reason why not smoke weed for like a year and a half.
That was good. You need to take some time off of that. But, uh, so, um, so yeah, she was, I mean, I guess she wasn't as bad as some other.
I mean, that's one reason she liked being with me. She likes hooking up with like American me and the Norwegian boyfriend, uh, Italian one is cause those guys just, uh, they're not jealous.

They're not two timing you and then trying to accuse you of being a prostitute. I guess the father of her kid was always calling her a prostitute and stuff and even held a gun to her head and like shot it in the air and threatened to kill her.
Cause she would like screw a guy or something, you know, to tie on him. Maybe, you know, she never did. So there's even movies like every movie you see down there is about being unfaithful.
Um, and I guess she said like all the, all the rich guys have in that country have, uh, have, um, have mistresses and like multiple mistresses and stuff. It's like an order of course.

And she did tell me one guy, one boss she had and it was this old nasty old rich guy who locked her in a bathroom and we didn't want to leave, let her go unless she like had sexual relations with him.
And, um, and then told her that, you know, he was going to fire her if she didn't, you know, do that.
And it was just really nasty to her and like always trying to tell her she's stupid and stuff.
And I mean, she hates rich people. That's like, I mean, according to like my wife and I guess who, who represents the poor under class, she thinks if you have money, you're automatically like evil.
Um, and I mean, I can understand. She's like, she said she had some job or she had to get up at six in the morning and take a bus one hour each way to work and work six days a week.
And she made like 200 bucks a month off of that 60 hours a week, you know, and taking a bus across a stinky loud city.
And on top of that, the boss was like always yelling at her and like being rude and stuff.
And then she got another job while I was first with her, um, as a secretary for one of her ex bosses, but not the boss who she got along with some other guy.
And like, after he hired her, he told her that, Oh, now she's going to have to work six days a week instead of five, you know?
And, but for the same price is like he originally said, and which was just a ridiculously low amount of money.
So she quit that after a month. Um, but anyways, yeah. So for the last two years that I was there, she didn't work at all until like the last six months.
She's trying to sell their own therapy products after she stopped the massage thing at the office.
But, uh, she would sell it to people who didn't, who didn't want to pay right away, but they'd pay later, but they never did.
So she kind of gave up on that. And, uh, I was making enough money as an English teacher. So it didn't really matter.
She'd get to hang out at home and cook for me and stuff. Plus I was working as a, uh, as a model.
I did like four commercials and a few photo shoots, but, uh, I was stupid. I didn't go to my castings and I didn't even go to like most of my callbacks and stuff.
So they kind of stopped calling me. I wish if I had a revolved time, I would have gone to all of those castings and all the callbacks because, uh, it was just a reason to ride my bike.
You know, it's, it's a good reason to ride across town and stay fit. Uh, cause I, I mean, I got a really big belly while I was there.
And that was the only exercise that I got. I wasn't like lifting weights or anything. I wish, I mean, if I had a car, I probably shouldn't have sold the second car,
But I just didn't want to risk it breaking down. Every time I felt like people were fixing it just to break down.
And that's actually what my wife said. She says that all mechanics fix cars to literally break down. I don't know.
She may be just kind of cynical though. Cause her dad was just a bad mechanic. But, um, but, uh, yeah.
Yeah. So I just didn't get a whole lot of exercise. I didn't get exercise some from like the construction.
I did though. Like her brother was kicked out of the house because, well, I don't want to say why
Because her mother got pissed off at his wife. That's all I can say. But, um, yeah, so they got kicked out.
But I knew that there, and I, my wife knew that he was only going to be gone a maximum of a month or two
Because there's no way he was going to be able to pay his rent because he was a crackhead.
And he was working. He wasn't working at his brother anymore cause he was fired from there for stealing gold.
So he was working at a supermarket.
He was working at a supermarket.
